title: Aged care bushfire evacuation plans are unrealistic, union warns
description: The vast majority of aged care facilities would be unable to evacuate in the case of a bushfire, according to the Australian Workers Union.
content:
Australian aged care homes are inadequately prepared to evacuate in a bushfire, according to a union representing aged care workers.
In January, more than 30 residents and staff at Natimuk Aged Care… [+6198 chars]
de: Pläne zur Evakuierung von Buschbränden in der Altenpflege sind unrealistisch, warnt die Gewerkschaft. Nach Angaben der Australian Workers Union wäre die überwiegende Mehrheit der Altenpflegeeinrichtungen im Falle eines Buschfeuers nicht in der Lage, ihre Häuser zu evakuieren.
en: Aged care bushfire evacuation plans are unrealistic, union warns. The vast majority of aged care facilities would be unable to evacuate in the case of a bushfire, according to the Australian Workers Union.
la: Anus cura decedere bushfire consilia unio unio unrealistica esse monet. Magna pars aetatis curarum facilitatum in casu fruticis decedere non posset, secundum Unionem operarios Australiae.

title: Mapping the future of wildfires in a warming world
description: YSE Senior Research Scientist Jennifer Marlon was part of an international team that combined global fire data and climate models to identify gaps in wildfire risk projections and outline a framework to better inform long-term planning.
content:
Listen to Article
How can scientists better assess the effects of a warming climate on wildfire behavior, fire risk, and long-term fire trends? A new review co-authored by Yale School of the Environ… [+5182 chars]
de: Kartierung der Zukunft von Waldbränden in einer sich erwärmenden Welt. Jennifer Marlon, leitende Forschungswissenschaftlerin am YSE, war Teil eines internationalen Teams, das globale Branddaten und Klimamodelle kombinierte, um Lücken in Prognosen zum Waldbrandrisiko zu identifizieren und einen Rahmen für eine bessere langfristige Planung zu entwerfen.
en: Mapping the future of wildfires in a warming world. YSE Senior Research Scientist Jennifer Marlon was part of an international team that combined global fire data and climate models to identify gaps in wildfire risk projections and outline a framework to better inform long-term planning.
la: destinata futura incendia in calefactione mundi. YSE Senior Research Scientist Jennifer Marlon pertinebat turmae internationalis quae globalem ignem datam et exempla climatis coniunxit ad recognoscendas lacunas in periculo proiecturae incendii et compagem ad melius informando consilio diuturno informando.
